name: HDFC Diners Club Black Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹5,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 5 Reward Points per ₹150 on all retail purchases (3.33% reward rate)
10X Reward Points via SmartBuy portal (~33% reward rate on flights, hotels, Amazon, Flipkart)

redemptionOptions: Airmiles (1 RP = 1 Airmile for InterMiles, KrisFlyer, Singapore Airlines)

loungeAccess.provider: Priority Pass & Diners Club Lounge Network

insurance.travelInsurance: Up to ₹50,00,000 emergency medical cover overseas
insurance.purchaseProtection: Up to ₹5,00,000 for 90 days from purchase

additionalBenefits: Unlimited domestic and international airport lounge access
Complimentary Priority Pass membership for primary and add-on cardholders
Complimentary Zomato Pro Plus / Swiggy One membership
Golf privileges at select courses across India
pros: 33% reward rate via SmartBuy 10X is among the best in India
Unlimited domestic and international lounge access via Priority Pass and Diners Club
₹15,000 in milestone benefits make annual fee effectively negative
1.99% forex markup is competitive for a super-premium card
Welcome vouchers worth ₹10,000 cover the joining fee
cons: Diners Club network has limited merchant acceptance in India
High income requirement of ₹15L limits accessibility
10X rewards cap of 25,000 bonus points/month can be limiting for heavy spenders
Fuel transactions excluded from reward earning
idealFor: Frequent travelers who want unlimited lounge access worldwide
High spenders who can maximize the SmartBuy 10X rewards portal
Premium cardholders seeking the best reward rate in the Indian market

faqs.question: How does the 10X SmartBuy rewards work?
faqs.answer: When you book flights, hotels, or shop on Amazon/Flipkart through the HDFC SmartBuy portal, you earn 10X Reward Points (50 RP per ₹150). At ₹1 per point, this translates to a ~33% reward rate. The bonus 10X points are capped at 25,000 per calendar month.

faqs.question: Is the lounge access really unlimited?
faqs.answer: Yes, both domestic and international airport lounge access is unlimited for the primary cardholder via Priority Pass and Diners Club lounge networks. Add-on cardholders also get unlimited access.

faqs.question: What are the milestone benefits?
faqs.answer: You earn bonus rewards at three spend milestones: ₹2,500 on spending ₹1L, ₹5,000 on ₹2L, and ₹7,500 on ₹3L annually. This totals ₹15,000 in milestone benefits, which more than covers the annual fee.

faqs.question: Is Diners Club accepted everywhere?
faqs.answer: Diners Club acceptance has improved significantly in India via the RuPay network integration, but it is still not as widely accepted as Visa or Mastercard. Most large merchants, online platforms, and restaurants accept it, but some smaller merchants may not.
